channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Why Decapitation Will Not Solve the United States’ Iran Problem
item.description: Killing Iran's top leaders may feel like a decisive blow, but history shows that decapitation rarely produces the political outcomes the United States hopes for, and often exacerbates instability.

item.title: States Weekly: March 4, 2026
item.description: This edition of States Weekly covers March 4, 2026.

item.title: Missiles of Iran | Missile Threat
item.description: Iran possesses the largest and most diverse missile arsenal in the Middle East. The CSIS Missile Defense Project unpacks Iran's current missile activity and capabilities.

item.title: Is Hezbollah Still a Threat?
item.description: Any U.S. successes against Iran can also help undermine Hezbollah. CSIS's Daniel Byman addresses key questions about Hezbollah's influence in Foreign Affairs.
